description:
Returns the player controlling the given unit if the argument is the unit, or the unit controlled by the player if the argument is the player.
{{Feature|important|See also [[Remote Control Tutorial]].}}
name: remoteControlled

ret.desc: the person controlling the unit or the unit controlled by the player; [[objNull]] if not applicable

Item.desc: unit under remote control or the player controlling a unit
Item.name: unitOrPlayer
